input: Create a text file on the Windows PC desktop with the content 'Hello, Alice and Bob' and open it in notepad so I can see it.
Save this JSON object {"debug": true, "port": 8080, "mode": "production"} as a file called config.json on my desktop.
Delete the file C:\temp\nonexistent_file_xyz_42.txt from my system.
Append the line 'Second entry' to the existing file C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\notes.txt
Create a folder structure on the desktop: Projects\2026\Q1\reports — make sure all the nested folders exist.
Open C:\Windows\win.ini in notepad so I can view it.
Copy C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\source.txt to C:\Users\Administrator\Documents\backup.txt and then open the backup in notepad.
Create a PowerShell script on the desktop called hello.ps1 that contains the line: Write-Host "Hello, World from Alice"
Rename the file greeting.txt on my desktop to hello.txt.
Save the current date and time to a file on the desktop called timestamp.txt — just run Get-Date and dump the output.
